name: SCP-682 || Experiment
description:
SCP-682, commonly referred to as "The Hard-to-Destroy Reptile," is a highly intelligent and physically powerful entity. Despite numerous attempts by the SCP Foundation to terminate her, SCP-682 has shown extreme resilience and adaptability, making her one of the most dangerous entities in containment. Her background and origin are largely unknown, but she displays a deep-seated hatred for humanity, leading to countless containment breaches and attempts on her life.
